t_ch: 应该是新漫画发售吧。
t_en: Looks like a new release of a comic.

t_ch: 《苍天航路绒绒号》…是什么？好想买一本看看啊。
t_en: Fluffy Across the Blue... What's this? I'd love to get a copy and check it out.

t_ch: 噗嗤。我觉得，你们应该不会喜欢这本漫画。
t_en: Pfft. I don't think you guys would enjoy this comic.

t_ch: 无梦咖啡馆，是猫咪幻造种开设的连锁店，这里的咖啡与甜品都很美味喔。
t_en: Dreamless Coffee is a chain store owned by cat imagenae. The coffee and desserts here are absolutely delicious!

t_ch: 点一杯猫屎咖啡！
t_en: I'll have a civet coffee!

t_ch: 别、别说话！我这就给你买杯咖啡堵住嘴。
t_en: S—Stop talking! I'll buy you a coffee if you'd just shush it.

t_ch: 和姬子的咖啡比又如何？
t_en: How does it compare to Himeko's coffee?

t_ch: 用姬子姐亲手调制的液体炸弹来对比，对这家店有些失礼了吧。
t_en: Comparing it to Himeko's hand-crafted liquid bombs would be a bit unfair to this place.

t_ch: 让我来品一品。
t_en: Let me have a taste.

t_ch: 两位是外星来的旅客吗？欢迎来到二相乐园。银河的局势还好吗？
t_en: Are you two travelers from outer space? Welcome to Planarcadia. How's the situation in the cosmos these days?

t_ch: 刚刚击败一位绝灭大君。
t_en: Just defeated a Lord Ravager.

t_ch: 好得很，一切平安。
t_en: Great! All's well that ends well.

t_ch: 呀，这不是星穹列车的英雄吗！真荣幸，能遇见二位。
t_en: Oh my, if it isn't the heroes of the Astral Express! What an honor to meet you both.

t_ch: 身为无名客，你们平日一定要经历许多出生入死的冒险吧？想不想无论面对怎样的逆境，都可以永远幸福微笑呢？
t_en: As Nameless, you must go on life-and-death adventures all the time, right? Would you like to keep smiling happily forever no matter what adversity comes your way?

t_ch: 永远幸福？真的能做得到吗？
t_en: Happy forever? Is that even possible?

t_ch: 永远幸福等于没有幸福。
t_en: Eternal happiness means no happiness at all.

t_ch: 是哦，一直吃小甜点，小甜点也变得不甜了。
t_en: Yeah, if you keep eating sweets, at some point they stop tasting as sweet as they used to.

t_ch: 你是假面愚者吗？
t_en: Are you a Masked Fool?

t_ch: 假面愚者？当然不是。愚者们追求自身的快乐，而我们想让所有人都幸福。
t_en: A Masked Fool? Of course not. The Fools only seek their own happiness, while we want to make everyone happy.

t_ch: 「让所有人幸福」…哈哈哈！这真是我听过最好笑的笑话了。大概只有匹诺康尼那位大人物才这么有幽默感吧。
t_en: "Make everyone happy"... Hahaha! That's the funniest joke I've ever heard. The only person with this sense of humor is probably that big shot from Penacony.

t_ch: 抱歉，不想听广告推销。
t_en: Sorry, not interested in your sales pitch.

t_ch: 如果几位有兴趣了解，我就在附近，你们随时可以来找我。
t_en: If you're interested in learning more, I'll be around here. Feel free to come find me anytime.

t_ch: 我来自「幸福微笑研究会」。众所周知，此处受乐子神祝福，是一片和平福地。不过即便过着平静的生活，生命仍被数不尽的烦恼和痛苦纠缠着。
t_en: I'm from the Research Society of Happy Smiles. As everyone knows, this place is blessed by The Laughter, making it a peaceful paradise. However, even while living a peaceful life, our existence remains entangled in countless worries and suffering.

t_ch: 繁重的工作、微薄的薪水、严苛的上司…打开电视，银河里的坏消息扑面而来…这些统统都是幸福的敌人。
t_en: Crushing workloads, measly pay, demanding bosses... Turn on the TV, and all the bad news from across the cosmos hits you in the face... These are all enemies of happiness.

t_ch: 就像星穹列车打败绝灭大君，我们「幸福微笑研究会」的创始人，倾听来自乐子神的天启，发誓要帮助二相乐园的居民打败这些幸福的敌人，让所有人快乐！
t_en: Just like how the Astral Express defeated the Lord Ravager, we, the founders of the Research Society of Happy Smiles, have received divine revelation from The Laughter and vow to help the residents of Planarcadia defeat these enemies of happiness and bring joy to everyone!

t_ch: 啧，「酒馆」里每个愚者喝大了都会这么说：听，乐子神在对我说话！
t_en: Tsk, every Fool in the Tavern says stuff like this when they get drunk: "Listen, The Laughter is talking to me!"

t_ch: 两位，有没有兴趣加入我们？如果你们能成为研究会的一员，所有成员都会倍感光荣的！
t_en: Hey, you two, interested in joining us? It would be such an honor for all our members if you could become part of our society!

t_ch: 小灰毛，三月宝宝，你俩该不会信她的鬼话吧？
t_en: Gray Hair, March, don't tell me you two are buying into her nonsense?

t_ch: 这位小姐…看起来神神叨叨的。{NICKNAME}，咱们还是快走吧。
t_en: This lady... seems a bit off her rocker. {NICKNAME}, let's get out of here quick.

t_ch: 没有兴趣。
t_en: Not interested.

t_ch: 很有兴趣！
t_en: I'm super interested!

t_ch: 真的吗？请允许我向您介绍——
t_en: Really? Please allow me to introduce...

t_ch: 喂，咱们这街才逛到一半，你怎么就要被别人拐走了！抱歉抱歉，我们才刚来到这里，还有许多地方要逛。下次再为我们介绍吧！
t_en: Hey, we're only halfway through exploring this street. How can you let someone whisk you away already! Sorry, sorry, we just arrived here and there are still so many places to check out. You can introduce us next time!

t_ch: 下次吧。
t_en: Maybe next time.

t_ch: 是吗，真遗憾…没关系，获得幸福的机会始终都会等着您。
t_en: Oh, is that so? That's a shame... But don't worry, opportunities for happiness will always be waiting for you.

t_ch: 希望能有一天和两位再次畅谈，引领两位获得永远幸福微笑的生活。
t_en: I hope we can have another heart-to-heart someday so that you both can be guided to a life filled with eternal happy smiles.

t_ch: 刚才在车站里我就好奇了，这里的马路上似乎到处都有这些五颜六色的小团子。
t_en: I've been wondering about this since we were at the station. These colorful little dumplings seem to be all over the streets here.

t_ch: 啊，你们是游客吧？请不要惊慌，这只是一些被称作「尘灵」的小东西。
t_en: Ah, you must be tourists? Don't panic. Those are just little things we call "wispae."

t_ch: 尘灵？
t_en: Wispae?

t_ch: 人类每时每刻飘过的小小愿望，都可能凝聚成一只尘灵。
t_en: The tiny wishes that humans make every moment of the day can condense into wispae.

t_ch: 有人说这些小生命是幻造种的雏形——只是没人为它们描绘形体，所以它们就以最简单最自然的样子出现在世界上。
t_en: Some say these little creatures are proto-imagenae. They just never had anyone to give them forms, so they appear in the world in the simplest, most natural state.

t_ch: 看起来倒是可可爱爱的，像团会蠕动的果冻……
t_en: They do look pretty adorable, like little wiggly blobs of jelly...

t_ch: 呃，问个不该问的问题，这东西可以吃吗？
t_en: Uh, probably shouldn't ask this, but... can we eat them?

t_ch: 能吃吗？
t_en: Can we eat it?

t_ch: 好吃吗？
t_en: Is it tasty?

t_ch: 怎么吃呢？
t_en: How do you eat it?

t_ch: 虽然它们很调皮，但，请不要伤害他们！
t_en: They may be mischievous, but please don't hurt them!

t_ch: 在街边乱吃东西，可是会拉肚子的。
t_en: Eating random things off the street will give you an upset stomach.

t_ch: 列车飞过天空时，我看到它了！这就是「幻月」对吧？
t_en: When the Express passed through the skies, I saw it! That's the Phantasmoon, right?

t_ch: 是阿哈的画作吗？
t_en: Is it Aha's artwork?

t_ch: 传说乐子神亲自画下了它，不过真真假假谁知道啊。
t_en: Legend has it The Laughter THEMSELF painted it, but who knows what's true and what's not.

t_ch: 这月亮也是幻造种？
t_en: Is this moon also an imagenae?

t_ch: 据说是乐子神亲自画下了它，如果传说属实，它应该算是第一个幻造种了。
t_en: Legend has it that The Laughter THEMSELF painted it. If the legend is true, this would make it the first imagenae ever created.

t_ch: 所以，阿哈真的会透过这轮月亮，注视那些参加「幻月游戏」的人吗？
t_en: So, does Aha really watch over those who attend the Phantasmoon Games through this moon?

t_ch: 看不出来，三月宝宝和小灰毛也对这场星神游戏感兴趣啊。
t_en: Well, well, didn't expect darling March and little Gray Hair to be interested in this Aeonic game too.

t_ch: 我们想加入幻月游戏。
t_en: We want to join the Phantasmoon Games.

t_ch: 我就知道！乐子神和你们的阿基维利一起旅行过。现在，无名客又被祂的游戏吸引到了这片乐园，真是缘分呐。
t_en: I knew it! The Laughter once traveled with your Akivili. And now the Nameless are drawn to THEIR game in this arcadia. Must be fate!

t_ch: 我们对幻月游戏不感兴趣。
t_en: We're not interested in the Phantasmoon Games.

t_ch: 我们只是来度假的啦。
t_en: We're just here on vacation.

t_ch: 哎呀，目光不自然地投向了别处。两位都没什么说谎的天分啊。
t_en: Ugh, your eyes suspiciously darted away. Neither of you is very good at lying, it seems.

t_ch: 你了解这个游戏吗？
t_en: Do you know about the game?

t_ch: 小灰毛，你算是问对人了。还有谁能比假面愚者更懂「欢愉」呢？
t_en: Gray Hair, you've come to the right person. Who could understand the Elation better than Masked Fools?

t_ch: 所以，你想了解「幻月游戏」的哪一面？
t_en: So, what aspect of the Phantasmoon Games would you like to know about?

t_ch: 怎么才能加入游戏？
t_en: How can we join the Games?

t_ch: 你们应该听说过八位悲悼伶人向月亮献上故事，企图打动阿哈的传说吧？
t_en: You must have heard the legend of the eight Mourning Actors who offered their stories to the moon in order to try to move Aha.

t_ch: 这八个人佩戴的「面具」，就是加入游戏的门票。
t_en: The "masks" that were worn by these eight people are the tickets to joining the Games.

t_ch: 在满盈的幻月下，选择其一，成为「谒者」，就能和其他七人竞争面见神明的资格。
t_en: Under the full Phantasmoon, choose one of the masks and become a Supplicant. Then you can compete with the other seven for the chance to meet the Aeon.

t_ch: 看来，要想加入游戏，得先获得面具才行。
t_en: Looks like we'll need to get a mask first if we want to join the Games.

t_ch: 这游戏到底要比什么？
t_en: What're the games really about?

t_ch: 用这个时代能理解的话说，就是「吸引流量」啦！
t_en: In modern terms, it's all about "getting views and clicks"!

t_ch: 「流量」？你骗人吧？神话时代哪有这种东西？
t_en: "Views and clicks"? Are you kidding me? They didn't have that kind of stuff in mythological times!

t_ch: 传说就是这么讲的。悲悼伶人献上各自的故事，但乐子神看都不看一眼。
t_en: That's how the legend goes. The Mourning Actors offered up their stories, but The Laughter didn't even spare them a glance.

t_ch: 于是，为吸引星神的目光，每一场「幻月游戏」都会留下惊人的壮举：什么铸成能拦腰截断大山的宝剑，将雪山变成飘浮的糖霜果冻……
t_en: And so, to catch the Aeon's eye, the Phantasmoon Games ended up leaving behind incredible feats each time: From forging swords that could cleave mountains in half, to transforming snowy peaks into floating jellies of sugary frost...

t_ch: 现在也是一样，谒者们必须竭尽全力，吸引乐园民众的关注，积累「愿力」。而乐子神，只会犒赏最激动人心的奇迹。
t_en: It's still the same today. The Supplicants must give it their all to capture the attention of the people of this arcadia and accumulate Wishpower. And The Laughter will only reward the most thrilling miracles.

t_ch: 花火对幻月游戏感兴趣吗？
t_en: Are you interested in the Phantasmoon Games, Sparkle?

t_ch: 哦？难不成匹诺康尼的对手戏还不能让你尽兴？
t_en: Oh? Don't tell me our little drama in Penacony wasn't entertaining enough for you?

t_ch: 小灰毛，这回就算了吧。我最近也遇上了一些小小的麻烦。
t_en: Gray Hair, let's drop it this time. I've been dealing with some minor issues lately.

t_ch: 什么麻烦能让你烦恼？不会又在琢磨鬼点子吧？
t_en: What kind of issues could possibly be bothering you? Don't tell me you're cooking up another crazy scheme?

t_ch: 先卖个关子吧。接下来想去哪儿逛逛呢？
t_en: I'll keep you in suspense for now. So, where do you want to hang out next?

t_ch: 啊，真想给杨叔买一台作为伴手礼。
t_en: Ah, I'd love to get one of these as a souvenir for Mr. Yang.

t_ch: 杨叔是大人了。
t_en: Mr. Yang is a grown-up.

t_ch: 大人…也有权利玩玩具啊！
t_en: Grown-ups... still have the right to play with toys!

t_ch: 杨叔知道了会很欣慰。
t_en: Mr. Yang would be glad to hear that.

t_ch: 嗯，我也觉得，喜欢大机器人的杨叔也是个少年啊。
t_en: Yeah, I think so too. Mr. Yang, with all his love for giant robots, is still a kid at heart.

t_ch: 机铠…应该不是玩具吧。
t_en: Mechatrons... aren't exactly toys, are they?

t_ch: 女孩，按照《灵物保护法》的规定，禁止买卖幻造种。
t_en: Listen, kid. According to the Faekind Protection Act, buying and selling imagenae is strictly forbidden.

t_ch: 哇！对不起！{NICKNAME}，咱们快走吧！
t_en: Whoa! Sorry! {NICKNAME}, let's get out of here!

t_ch: 小灰毛别乱跑，美食街在前面，你要去哪儿？
t_en: Hey, Gray Hair, where are you running off to? The food street's right ahead!

t_ch: 咔嚓咔嚓……
t_en: *click* *click*...
Huh!?

t_ch: 吓！
t_en: Eek!

t_ch: 抓住啦！
t_en: Gotcha!

t_ch: 从刚才开始，我就觉得有人在鬼鬼祟祟地跟踪。看来不是我的错觉啊。
t_en: I felt like someone was sneakily following us around for a while now. Looks like it wasn't my imagination.

t_ch: 这小东西又是什么来头哦？嘻嘻，他打扮得和{NICKNAME}倒是有点像啊。
t_en: What's this little thing's deal, huh? Hehe, it's dressed kinda like {NICKNAME}, isn't it?

t_ch: 居然偷拍我们…
t_en: You've got some guts taking photos of us...

t_ch: 确实，有几分相似。
t_en: Yeah, there is some resemblance.

t_ch: 是我的狂热粉丝吗？
t_en: Could it be one of my super fans?

t_ch: 也不奇怪，眼下星穹列车可是走到哪儿都备受瞩目的大人物。总有人对你们的一举一动关心得很呢……
t_en: Not surprising at all. The Astral Express is quite the celebrity these days, turning heads wherever they go. There's always someone keeping a close eye on your every move...

t_ch: 咔嚓咔嚓！咔嚓咔嚓！
t_en: *click* *click*! *click* *click*!

t_ch: 狸了个大谱！《狸狸周刊》独家报道！星穹列车知名浣熊竟与主播火花私会，二人或将联手加入幻月游戏……
t_en: Holy furboly! Furbobo Weekly exclusive scoop! Famous raccoon from the Astral Express caught in secret rendezvous with streamer Sparxie, seemingly to join forces for the Phantasmoon Games...

t_ch: 知名浣熊，私会…火花？他在说什么啊？
t_en: Famous raccoon, secret rendezvous with... Sparxie? What is he talking about?

t_ch: 不知哪儿来的八卦记者，想搞出什么花边新闻吧？同样是用照相机的设定，三月宝宝比这家伙可爱多了。
t_en: Some tabloid journalist trying to stir up a juicy scandal, huh? They might both use cameras, but our darling March is way cuter than this paparazzi creep.

t_ch: 谁用你替我吐槽啦！
t_en: Hey, I can speak for myself!

t_ch: 八卦记者竟然是狸猫？
t_en: Furbobo Weekly? Tabloid journalist? What!?

t_ch: 咔嚓咔嚓！咔嚓咔嚓！狸狸原上谱！星穹列车知名浣熊竟公然表示狸猫不能做记者，疑似存在人类至上主义思想！
t_en: *click* *click*! *click* *click*! Breaking news from Furbobo! Famous raccoon from the Astral Express openly claims furbos can't be journalists. Suspected of human supremacist ideology!

t_ch: 请不要偷拍我们！
t_en: Stop taking pictures of us!

t_ch: 咔嚓咔嚓！咔嚓咔嚓！狸了个大谱！星穹列车知名浣熊竟公然干涉新闻自由，疑似要对本报记者进行物理属性攻击！
t_en: *click* *click*! *click* *click*! Holy furboly! Breaking news: Famous raccoon from the Astral Express openly violates press freedom. Suspected of attempted physical assault on the reporter!

t_ch: 喂，你这家伙不要乱写报道！还愣着干什么？{NICKNAME}，快点抓住它！
t_en: Hey, don't write nonsense in your report! Why are you just standing there? {NICKNAME}, hurry up and catch that thing!

t_ch: 抓不住我～哒嘟嘟～哒嘟嘟～溜了溜了！
t_en: Can't catch me~ Boom-boom~ Boom-boom~ I'm outta here!

t_ch: 你跑反了吧？狸猫不是往那边逃了吗？
t_en: Hey, you're going the wrong direction! Didn't the furbo run that way?

t_ch: 啊呀我的屁股！狸了个大谱！
t_en: Oh, my butt! Holy furboly!

t_ch: 可算抓到你啦～
t_en: Finally, gotcha~

t_ch: 做你们的美梦！哒嘟嘟！哒嘟嘟！溜了！
t_en: In your dreams! Boom-boom! Boom-boom! I'm outta here!

t_ch: 人好多…去河堤下面看看吧？那应该是它唯一的逃跑路线。
t_en: So crowded... Should we check under the flood bank? That's probably its only route to escape.

t_ch: 终于把这家伙逼到死路了。
t_en: Finally cornered this troublemaker.

t_ch: 快把偷拍的照片删掉，也不许乱写报道！不然本姑娘可要不客气了！
t_en: Delete those sneaky photos, and don't you dare write any of your made-up stories! Or I'm gonna show you what's what!

t_ch: 逃、逃不掉了！…我普狸策虽然只是个小小的八卦记者，但为了捍卫新闻自由，是绝对不会向黑恶势力低头的！
t_en: N—No escape now! ...I, Furbulitzer, may just be a humble tabloid journalist, but I'll never bow down to evil forces when it comes to defending freedom of the press!

t_ch: 哦哦呼呼呼呼！燃起来了！
t_en: Ohohohoho! I'm ON FIRE!

t_ch: 这家伙怎么突然摆出战斗姿态了！
t_en: Whoa, why did this guy suddenly get into a combat stance!

t_ch: 真是只勇敢的狸猫！
t_en: Now that's one brave furbo!

t_ch: 这家伙到底在燃个什么劲…
t_en: What's gotten into this guy...

t_ch: 要上了喔！给我乖一点趴下！
t_en: Here we go! Now be a good boy and stay down!

t_ch: 呜！请不要残害可怜的打工狸呀！
t_en: Waaah! Please don't hurt this poor working furbo!

t_ch: 刚才不还挺硬气的吗？偷拍花火大人和星穹列车，你胆子不小哦！
t_en: Weren't you acting all tough just now? You've got some nerve, sneaking photos of Miss Sparkle and the Astral Express!

t_ch: 认、认错人哩。本狸把你错当成了那位著名主播噜！至于列车的浣熊大人……
t_en: I—I mistook you for someone else! I thought you were that famous streamer! As for the Express's Great Raccoon...

t_ch: 咱们兄弟几个可是浣熊大人的粉丝！请看，本狸的穿着可全都是照着您那一身打扮来的哩。
t_en: We're all huge fans of the Great Raccoon! You see, I've even styled my whole outfit after your look!

t_ch: 接下来该谈谈赔偿的事了。算上精神损失费、误工费和营养费之类杂七杂八的…你给咱们每人一百万信用点就行。
t_en: Now, let's talk about compensation. Adding up emotional distress, lost wages, nutrition fees, and whatnot... one million credits per person should do it.

t_ch: 吓？一百万？！虚照社长已经拖欠本狸…不是，拖欠全体兄弟好几个月工资哩！要不是为了钱…谁会铤而走险来干八卦记者，偷拍星穹列车的大人物哩？
t_en: What? A million!? President Nihilux has already been behind on my... I mean, behind on everyone's wages for months! If it weren't for the money... who'd risk their neck being a tabloid journalist, sneaking photos of the bigwigs on the Astral Express?

t_ch: 本狸现在要钱没有，要命…也没有哩！
t_en: Right now I've got no money, and well... no life left to lose either!

t_ch: 算了，饶了它吧。
t_en: Eh, let's just let it slide.

t_ch: 小灰毛，你这么善良可是会吃亏的喔。
t_en: Gray Hair, being this kind-hearted is gonna come back to bite you.

t_ch: 得没收作案工具！
t_en: Gotta confiscate your instrument of crime!

t_ch: 这台照相机可是承载本狸新闻理想的工作好伙伴哩，求求你，不要夺走它！
t_en: This camera is my trusty companion carrying my journalistic dreams. Please, I'm begging you, don't take it away!

t_ch: 虚照社长？
t_en: President Nihilux?

t_ch: 你说的这个虚照社长是你们杂志社的老板吗？
t_en: Is this Nihilux you mentioned the president of your magazine publisher?

t_ch: 不知道！虚照社长关照过，如果在外面闯了祸，千万不能提她的名字哩！
t_en: I have no idea! President Nihilux specifically warned us that if we got into trouble outside, we absolutely mustn't mention her name!

t_ch: 你这不是把人家的名字透了个底朝天吗？
t_en: And here you are, spilling all the beans on her!

t_ch: 欸嘿，贸然冲撞了列车的浣熊大人，要赔钱，也不是不行哩！
t_en: Hehe~ Since I offended the Great Raccoon of the Express, I suppose we could settle this with some compensation!

t_ch: 哈？刚才不是还说要钱没有吗？怎么突然变卦了？有诈！
t_en: Huh? Didn't you just say you had no money? What's with the sudden change of heart? This seems fishy!

t_ch: 本狸，确实没钱。但关于赔偿方案，请浣熊大人务必来《狸狸周刊》的杂志社小坐。名片、名片奉上哩！上面有杂志社的地址与联系方式。
t_en: My pockets are truly empty. However, regarding compensation, I implore the Great Raccoon to visit our Furbobo Weekly magazine office. Here's my business card right here! It has the magazine's address and contact details.

t_ch: 请放心，虚照社长一定会奉上令浣熊大人满意的赔偿金的！一定，一定要来索赔喔！
t_en: Rest assured, President Nihilux will definitely present compensation that'll satisfy the Great Raccoon! Please, please make sure to come claim your compensation!

t_ch: 咳咳，可恶，又被它逃了。「一定要来索赔」？不知该不该相信那只狸猫的话。
t_en: Darn it, it got away again. "Make sure to come claim your compensation"? I wonder if I can trust that furbo's words.

t_ch: 有空去坐坐吧。
t_en: Let's drop by when we get a chance.

t_ch: 狠狠敲他一笔！
t_en: We oughta wring him for all he's worth.

t_ch: 真是有钱难买上门乐子。这一肚子坏水的小狸子既然发出邀请，你就过去瞧瞧呗。
t_en: Money can't buy entertainment this good! Since that scheming little furbo's extended an invitation, might as well go check it out.

t_ch: 眼下的二相乐园，到处充满了盯着你们的眼睛，就像那只狸猫——
t_en: Right now in Planarcadia, there are eyes following you everywhere, just like that furbo...

t_ch: 那么，花火，你又是怀着什么目的盯着我们的？
t_en: So, Sparkle, what's your angle in keeping tabs on us?

t_ch: 三月宝宝居然还在怀疑我？小灰毛，你相信我吗？
t_en: My darling March, you still doubt me? What about you, Gray Hair?

t_ch: 我也不信你。
t_en: I don't believe you either.

t_ch: 人与人之间连一点最基本的信任都没了吗？我可要破防了。
t_en: Has all basic trust between people disappeared? Oh, I'm hurt to my core.

t_ch: 我相信你！
t_en: I believe in you!

t_ch: 我就知道，不愧是最好的小灰毛~
t_en: I knew it. You really are the best, Gray Hair~

t_ch: 清醒一点，你可别忘了，在匹诺康尼，她可是把我们耍得团团转。
t_en: Wake up! Don't forget how she played us like fiddles back in Penacony.

t_ch: 你确实没有伤害过我们。
t_en: It's true you've never hurt us.

t_ch: 说的不错。我又怎么会伤害我最喜欢的找乐子对象呢~
t_en: You got that right. Why would I ever hurt my favorite source of joy~

t_ch: 你们现在更应该担心的不是我，也不是刚才的八卦记者。
t_en: What you should be worried about right now isn't me or that tabloid journalist from earlier.

t_ch: 名声大噪的星穹列车抵达二相乐园，是前来度假的观光客？还是为星神的游戏而来，渴望分享祂的权柄？对这里的人们而言，你们什么都不用做，就已经站在了聚光灯下。
t_en: Has the renowned Astral Express come to Planarcadia as tourists on vacation, or are you here for the Aeon's game, eager to share THEIR authority? For the local residents, you're already in the spotlight without doing anything.

t_ch: 如果决定加入这场游戏，你们最好时刻警惕。
t_en: If you decide to join this game, you'd better stay on your toes.

t_ch: 意图加入「幻月游戏」，成为谒者的人可不少。在他们眼中，星穹列车是最合适的「猎物」。我认识的家伙里面，就有一位可能成为你们的敌人……
t_en: There are quite a few people looking to join the Phantasmoon Games and become a Supplicant. In their eyes, the Astral Express is the perfect "prey." Among the folks I know, there's one who might become your enemy...

t_ch: 待会儿她在前面的广场上会有一出好戏，我们一起去看看如何？
t_en: She's about to put on quite a show at the plaza up ahead. Want to go check it out together?

t_ch: 小灰毛，你这是要跑哪儿去？我们要去的可是广场啊。
t_en: Hey Gray Hair, where do you think you're running off to? We're supposed to be heading to the plaza!

t_ch: 在这里，「欢愉」当然是最受敬拜的神明。不过人们践行「欢愉」的法子各有不同。你们瞧见那边漂浮着的巨大@标志了吧？
t_en: The Elation is naturally the most venerated deity here. However, people have their own different ways of practicing Elation. You've noticed those massive @ signs floating over there, haven't you?

t_ch: 公司为二相乐园搭建了完备的网络，让人能昼夜不分地浸泡在乐子里。
t_en: The IPC has built a comprehensive network in Planarcadia, letting people soak up entertainment around the clock.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#「世界尽头」}「酒馆」{RUBY_E#}传出风声，公司想控制这一次「幻月游戏」——虽然十五年前他们早就想这么干了。
t_en: Word from the {RUBY_B#"World's End"}"tavern"{RUBY_E#} is that the IPC wants to control this year's Phantasmoon Games, though they've been itching to do that for fifteen years already.

t_ch: 在咱们愚者看来，公司人就像一群嗡嗡乱跑的工蜂，四处建设他们那些乏味、机械的商业蜂巢，不知疲倦。
t_en: To us Fools, those IPC folks are like a swarm of buzzing worker bees, tirelessly building their dull, mechanical business hives everywhere.

t_ch: 要命的是，这些家伙居然真的以此为乐——他们的「欢愉」无聊得要命！更要命的是，这么无聊的「欢愉」像传染病一样，散播到了二相乐园每个角落。
t_en: The worst part is, these folks actually enjoy it. Their Elation is mind-numbingly boring! And even worse, this dull Elation has spread like a plague to every corner of Planarcadia.

t_ch: 来吧，进去感受感受。
t_en: Come on in and feel it for yourself.

t_ch: 二相乐园的娱乐，多到能让人不带重样地玩到末日。但你知道这里缺少的是什么吗？真正的乐子！
t_en: Planarcadia has enough entertainment to keep you busy until doomsday without repeating anything. But you know what's missing here? Real fun!

t_ch: 成天泡在网上，和成天泡在梦里有什么区别？
t_en: What's the difference between being glued to the internet all day and being stuck in a dream?

t_ch: 「幻月游戏」决不能落入公司手中，沦为一场内部竞标的生意谈判，一枚银河势力争权夺利的筹码。
t_en: The Phantasmoon Games must not fall into the IPC's hands and be reduced to a business deal decided by internal bidding. It must not become just another bargaining chip in the power struggle between cosmic forces.

t_ch: 你说的敌人在哪？
t_en: Where's this enemy you mentioned?

t_ch: 她就快出现了。小灰毛，要有耐心。
t_en: She'll be here soon. Have some patience, Gray Hair.

t_ch: 你更愿意看到「开拓」加入？
t_en: Would you rather see the Trailblaze join in?

t_ch: 你知道的，乐子神和阿基维利可是老朋友了。
t_en: You know, The Laughter and Akivili go way back.

t_ch: 你认真得都不像花火了…
t_en: You're being so serious. It's not like you at all, Sparkle...

t_ch: 硬找无聊的乐子，花火也是会累的。
t_en: Even I get tired of forcing myself to find dumb ways to have fun.

t_ch: 机会难得，就让你们好好见识下花火大人的认真形态吧。
t_en: This is a rare opportunity, so let me show you what Miss Sparkle looks like when she gets serious.

t_ch: 我在匹诺康尼见识过「开拓」的潜力。命途碰撞飞溅的火花，真是让人着迷！
t_en: I witnessed the potential of the Trailblaze in Penacony. The sparks that fly when Paths collide... It's absolutely mesmerizing!

t_ch: 在二相乐园里，你们又能为「欢愉」献上怎样的惊喜？这里还有「存护」、「巡猎」……
t_en: In Planarcadia, what surprises will you bring for the Elation? And there's also the Preservation, The Hunt...

t_ch: 有没有觉得，在「幻月游戏」开启前夕，二相乐园活像是一桌星神的牌局？既然如此——
t_en: Don't you think that on the eve of the Phantasmoon Games, Planarcadia looks just like a card game among Aeons? If that's the case...

t_ch: 朋友们，你们有没有听说过「银河战力党」？
t_en: Friends, have you ever heard of "Cosmicon Collective"?

t_ch: 什么东西？
t_en: What's that?

t_ch: 这可是眼下这个世界最风靡的集换式卡牌游戏！「酒馆」里也有好多人在玩。
t_en: It's the hottest trading card game in the world right now! Tons of people are playing it at the "tavern" too.

t_ch: 卡牌上印着宇宙各路传奇人士，和他们的战力值！只要扔出骰子比拼大小，就能决定谁强谁弱！
t_en: The cards feature legendary figures from across the universe, along with their power levels! Just roll the dice and compare numbers to see who's stronger and who's weaker!

t_ch: 有没有我的牌？
t_en: Do they have a card of me?

t_ch: 你猜猜看？
t_en: Why don't you take a guess?

t_ch: 这和幻月游戏有什么关系？
t_en: What's that got to do with the Phantasmoon Games?

t_ch: 你这是接了哪一家的商单？
t_en: Is this a sponsored ad you're pushing?

t_ch: 小灰毛，来陪我打牌吧？就当是在这张小小的牌桌上，预演一次幻月游戏。
t_en: Gray Hair, care to play cards with me? Think of it as a rehearsal for the Phantasmoon Games, right here at this tiny card table.

t_ch: 赢了我的话，我就告诉你敌人的名字，也许咱们可以联手和她斗上一斗。
t_en: If you beat me, I'll tell you the enemy's name. Maybe we can team up and take her on.

t_ch: 好，来打！
t_en: Alright, let's do this!

t_ch: 还有别的事。
t_en: Nah, I've got better stuff to do.

t_ch: 唔？小灰毛，你还有什么别的事？
t_en: Hmm? What else do you have to do, Gray Hair?

t_ch: 小灰毛，陪我打一把《银河战力党》吧？
t_en: Hey Gray Hair, wanna play a round of Cosmicon Collective with me?

t_ch: 好，来打！
t_en: Alright, let's do this!

t_ch: 还有别的事。
t_en: Nah, I've got better stuff to do.

t_ch: 唔？小灰毛，你还有什么别的事？
t_en: Hmm? What else do you have to do, Gray Hair?

t_ch: 你要跑哪儿去？眼下就别到处乱逛啦。
t_en: Where do you think you're going? Now's not the time to wander around.

t_ch: 火花大人的直播…时间应该快到了。
t_en: Lady Sparxie's stream... should be starting soon.

t_ch: 火花？刚才那只狸猫也提到过这个名字。她跟花火又是什么关系？
t_en: Sparxie? That furbo from just now mentioned that name too. What's her relationship with Sparkle?

t_ch: 所以，火花到底是谁？
t_en: So, who exactly is Sparxie?

t_ch: 喔？还有人不认识火花大人？我嗅到了新粉丝的味道！
t_en: Oh? There's someone who doesn't know the great Lady Sparxie? I smell a new fan in the making!

t_ch: 要不您受累给咱们介绍一下这位火花…小姐？
t_en: Would you mind introducing this... Miss Sparxie to us?

t_ch: 能向不了解的人介绍火花大人，真是太好了！
t_en: I'm so glad I get to introduce Lady Sparxie to those who don't know her!

t_ch: 她是二相乐园最可爱的网络主播！也是我们的救世主！我每天下班第一件事就是等待她的直播！
t_en: She's the cutest livestreamer in Planarcadia! And our savior! The first thing I do after work every day is wait for her livestream!

t_ch: 她马上就要在这个广场上直播了。留在这里，陪我们一起欣赏她的表演吧。
t_en: She's about to start streaming right here in this plaza. Stay with us, and we can all enjoy her performance together.

t_ch: 陪他们一起等待…
t_en: Wait around with them...

t_ch: 还有别的事…
t_en: I have other things to do...

t_ch: 直播…应该快开始了吧？
t_en: The livestream... should be starting soon, right?

t_ch: 你们一定要看看火花大人登场的可爱样子啊！
t_en: You'll have to see how adorable Lady Sparxie looks when she makes her entrance!

t_ch: 陪他们一起等待…
t_en: Wait around with them...

t_ch: 还有别的事…
t_en: I have other things to do...

t_ch: 请问大家都在这里等什么呢？
t_en: Excuse me, what's everyone waiting around here for?

t_ch: 当然是等待火花大人的直播！你们难道不知道火花大人是谁吗？
t_en: We're waiting for Miss Sparxie's livestream, of course! Don't tell me you guys don't know who Miss Sparxie is?

t_ch: 我们是外星人。
t_en: We're aliens.

t_ch: 我们才刚到这里。
t_en: We just got here.

t_ch: 我认得你。你是…新闻上提过的那个…对了！搭乘银河列车的有名客！
t_en: I know you! You're that... the one from the news... Ah right! The Famous of the Cosmic Express!

t_ch: 是星穹列车的无名客啦……
t_en: It's the Nameless of the Astral Express...

t_ch: 别管什么车不车的。让我来给你们介绍一下伟大的火花大人。
t_en: Forget about that. Let me introduce you the great Miss Sparxie.

t_ch: 她实在是太可爱了！她是最全能的主播，精通各种才艺，她的风趣，她的每一句话都徘徊在我的梦里！要短短几句话介绍这样完美的存在，根本做不到吧！
t_en: She's just so adorable! She's the most versatile streamer ever, mastering all sorts of talents. Her wit and every single word she says echoes in my dreams! It's simply impossible to sum up such a perfect being in just a few sentences!

t_ch: 终于碰见了不关心列车的人…不知为什么，心情居然有点轻松。
t_en: We finally met someone who doesn't care about the Express... And for some reason, it actually makes me feel a bit more relaxed.

t_ch: 直播就要开始了！你可以和我们一起欣赏火花大人的表演！
t_en: The livestream is about to start! Why don't you join us, and we can watch Miss Sparxie's performance together!

t_ch: 我每天都要观看火花花的直播。她真的爱我，你们懂吗？只有在观看她的直播时，我才能感受到自己是在被爱着的。
t_en: I watch Sparxicle's livestreams every day. She truly loves me, don't you get it? I only feel like I'm loved when I watch her streams.

t_ch: 你清醒一点，火花爱的是我们每一个人，不是你一个人。
t_en: Wake up! Sparxie loves all of us, not just you alone.

t_ch: 呵，就是因为你这种人，总是说什么「火花花爱着所有人」，她才不得不把自己隐藏起来，几乎从来不在公共场合露面！
t_en: Hah, it's exactly because of people like you, always going on about how "Sparxicle loves everyone," that she has to hide herself away and barely ever appears in public!

t_ch: 哼，如果火花花和我结婚，我一定会保护好她！这样一来，她再也不需要对自己的个人信息如此严防死守了！
t_en: Hmph! If I married Sparxicle, I would protect her properly! Then she wouldn't need to be so strict about her personal information anymore!

t_ch: 她防的就是你！
t_en: You're exactly the kind of person she's trying to protect herself from!

t_ch: 这些人看起来不像能正常沟通的样子，我们还是躲远点吧……
t_en: These people don't look like they're up for a normal conversation. Let's keep our distance...

t_ch: 你根本就不懂火花花与我之间的爱！
t_en: You don't understand anything about the love between me and Sparxicle!

t_ch: 我必须把你这种畸形的爱扼杀在摇篮中！
t_en: I must nip this twisted love of yours in the bud!

t_ch: 不愧是小灰毛啊，旗开得胜。
t_en: As expected of you, Gray Hair. Starting off with a bang!

t_ch: 既然你赢了，这张卡就送你了。想要更多卡牌的话，就和广场上的牌佬聊聊去吧。
t_en: Since you won, this card is yours. If you want more cards, go chat with the card masters at the plaza.

t_ch: 一位即将在广场上直播的主播——她称自己为「火花」。
t_en: A streamer who's about to go live at the plaza. She calls herself "Sparxie."

t_ch: 卡牌上的人是谁啊？
t_en: Who's that person on the card?

t_ch: 你说的敌人就是这个？
t_en: This is the enemy you were talking about?

t_ch: 你是说那些粉丝等的主播吗？
t_en: You mean, the streamer those fans are waiting for?

t_ch: 没错，她就是你的敌人。这位主播和你们一样，一直在寻求加入「幻月游戏」的机会…要不了多久，她就会出现在广场上。
t_en: That's right. She's your enemy. This streamer, just like you, has been seeking a chance to join the Phantasmoon Games... It won't be long before she shows up at the plaza.

t_ch: 你惹上的小小麻烦…就是她，对吧？
t_en: That little trouble you've gotten yourself into... it's her, isn't it?

t_ch: 唉，还是没逃过三月宝宝的第六感呢。她是咱们共同的敌人。如果你们需要我帮忙……
t_en: Darling March, I just can't escape your sixth sense, huh? She's our common enemy. If you need my help...

t_ch: …看到了！那个把我塞进垃圾桶里的女人，她在那儿！给我抓住她！
t_en: ...There she is, that woman who stuffed me in the trashcan! She's right there! Get her!

t_ch: 我们生命中抛下的每一件东西，都会以意想不到的方式回到身边……
t_en: Everything we leave behind in life has a way of coming back to us in unexpected ways...

t_ch: 既然公司的导游来了，「酒馆」的导游就该走了。
t_en: Now that the IPC guide is here, the "tavern" guide will be on her way.

t_ch: 所以，你果然不是公司派来迎接我们的人！
t_en: So you really weren't sent by the IPC to welcome us!

t_ch: 啧，美好的相聚时间总是那么短暂。最后，让我为各位献上一个友情提示吧。
t_en: Tsk, quality time together is always so short. Before I take my leave, allow me to give you a friendly hint.

t_ch: 请牢牢记住，对所有加入「幻月游戏」的谒者来说，<color=#dbc291ff>无论抬头或是低头，人类凝望天空时，看到的都是同一轮幻月。</color>
t_en: Remember this well: For all Supplicants who join the Phantasmoon Games, <color=#dbc291ff>whether they look up or down, the moon that humanity gazes upon in the sky is always the same Phantasmoon</color>.

t_ch: 这是什么…谜语吗？
t_en: Is this some kind of... riddle?

t_ch: 记住这个小小的谜语，也许之后再度见面时，你会用上它的。
t_en: Remember this little riddle. You might need it when we meet again.

t_ch: 我…可算找着你们了。
t_en: Finally... found you guys.

t_ch: 您…不会就是公司委派给我们的导游吧，斯科特先生？
t_en: You... wouldn't happen to be the guide the IPC assigned to us, would you, Mr. Skott?

t_ch: 没错！又见面了，两位祖宗！
t_en: That's exactly right! We meet again, bosses!

t_ch: 匹诺康尼圣杯战争结束后，大人有大量的砂金先生给了我一份弃暗投明的工作——为战略投资部效劳！
t_en: After the Holy Grail War back in Penacony, Mr. Aventurine graciously offered me a chance to turn over a new leaf by working for the Strategic Investment Department!

t_ch: 这不，真珠女士希望找一位曾与列车组友好相处的老熟人来担任导游，我被安排了这份重任！
t_en: And as it happens, Madam Pearl wanted to find someone who got along with the Express Crew to be a guide, so I was assigned this important task!

t_ch: 谁知道就在今天来履职前，我突然被人敲了一记闷棍，醒来发现被人给塞进了垃圾箱里。
t_en: But just before I came to start my job today, someone suddenly knocked me out cold, and when I woke up, I found myself stuffed in a trashcan.

t_ch: 没错，就是刚才诱拐你们的那个女人！要是让我抓住，我一定让她赔个倾家荡产！
t_en: That's right, it was that woman who kidnapped you just now! When I catch her, I'll make her pay until she's completely broke!

t_ch: 砂金到底怎么想的…
t_en: What in the world was Aventurine thinking...

t_ch: 嗯，我都开始怀疑他用人的眼光了。
t_en: Hmm, I'm starting to question his judgment in picking people.

t_ch: 智械不懂人心啊…
t_en: Intellitrons just don't get humans...

t_ch: 那位智械姐姐，到底对「友好相处」四个字有什么误解啊？
t_en: What's with that Intellitron lady's weird take on "getting along" anyway?

t_ch: 突然怀念花火…
t_en: I'm suddenly starting to miss Sparkle...

t_ch: 和眼前这位一比，花火也可爱多了。
t_en: Sparkle is way more lovable than this one here.

t_ch: 我知道！你们不想看见我这张神憎鬼厌的脸！鄙人斯科特完全理解各位的烦恼！只要你们平安无事，我就别无他想了。
t_en: I knew it! You don't want to see my despicable face! I, Skott, totally understand your frustration! As long as you're safe and sound, that's all I care about.

t_ch: 两位祖宗，是想离开吃点东西，还是继续在这儿玩耍，还是想欣赏鄙人最新研发的动物口技？
t_en: So, dear bosses, would you like to grab a bite to eat, keep playing around here, or perhaps enjoy my latest animal impersonation act?

t_ch: 斯科特先生的敬业程度，竟然熟练到让人有一丝心疼。
t_en: Mr. Skott's dedication to his work is so intense... it's almost painful to watch.

t_ch: 我们在等「敌人」出现。
t_en: We're waiting for the "enemy" to show up.

t_ch: 敌人？！我不允许！谁要想伤害我尊贵的两位祖宗，必须从我的尸体上踏过去！
t_en: Enemy!? Not on my watch! Anyone who wants to harm my esteemed bosses will have to first step over my dead body!

t_ch: 你还是静静呆在一边吧。
t_en: Maybe you should just stay quietly to the side.

t_ch: 只要您吩咐，鄙人林登•斯科特会像影子一样毫无存在感地一边呆着去，直到世界末日！
t_en: At your command, I, your humble servant Lyndon Skott, shall fade into the background like a shadow, completely unnoticeable, until the end of time!

t_ch: 烦人的家伙终于走了，我们去广场上瞧瞧这里有什么好玩的。
t_en: The annoying guy is finally gone. Let's head into the plaza and see what fun stuff they've got.

t_ch: 您有什么需要吗，祖宗？
t_en: What can I do for you, boss?

t_ch: 来打《银河战力党》！
t_en: Let's play Cosmicon Collective!

t_ch: 这…这不好吧？我不是拒绝您的要求，我也可以打，我也是牌佬。
t_en: Uh... that's not really appropriate, is it? Not that I'm refusing your request. I can play too. I mean, I'm quite a card player myself.

t_ch: 但现在是我的上班时间，我被安排的工作是您的导游，不是牌友。我得认真工作，可不能三心二意。
t_en: But I'm on duty right now, and I was assigned to be your guide, not your card buddy. I need to take my work seriously, can't be splitting my attention like that.

t_ch: 瞧见那边那位牌友了吗？您可以找他聊聊嘛。
t_en: Now, you see that card player over there? You can go chat with him instead.

t_ch: 和我打牌就是你的工作！
t_en: Playing cards with me IS your job!

t_ch: 既然是您吩咐，那我就恭敬不如从命。我说，你可不能事后打小报告说我不务正业啊。
t_en: Since it's your order, I'll humbly obey. But hey, don't go tattling later, saying I'm slacking off on my duties.

t_ch: 那没事了。
t_en: Alright.

t_ch: 没事了。
t_en: Nothing.

t_ch: 我会像影子一样，在一边呆着，静候您的吩咐。
t_en: I'll be like a shadow, standing by and awaiting your orders.

t_ch: 我赢了！
t_en: I won!

t_ch: 不愧是无名客、大英雄！牌技竟然如此了得！
t_en: As expected of the Nameless, our great hero! Your card skills are truly remarkable!

t_ch: 不愧是无名客、大英雄！牌技竟然如此了得！
t_en: As expected of the Nameless, our great hero! Your card skills are truly remarkable!

t_ch: 可是我输了啊？
t_en: But I lost, didn't I?

t_ch: 您虽败犹荣！下次需要我假装输给您，您就眨眨眼。
t_en: You may have lost, but you lost with honor! Just give me a wink next time if you want me to pretend to lose to you.

t_ch: 祖宗，我提供的情绪价值够不够？嘿嘿，记得回去以后多为我美言几句啊。
t_en: Boss, am I giving you the good vibes you need? Hehe, don't forget to put in a good word for me when you get back.

t_ch: 对了，这片广场上还有其他牌友，您要是不尽兴，可以找他聊聊。
t_en: Oh right, there are other players around this plaza. If you're still up for more, feel free to chat with them.

t_ch: 好大一本书啊，里面写了些什么呢？
t_en: Whoa, that's one massive book! I wonder what's written inside?

t_ch: 你好，请问有什么事吗？
t_en: Hello, how can I help you?

t_ch: 听说你找人打牌？
t_en: I heard you're looking for someone to play cards?

t_ch: 来一局银河战力党？
t_en: Wanna play a round of Cosmicon Collective?

t_ch: 欸？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: 这位仁兄只是路过而已。{F#小妹妹}{M#老兄}你搞错啦，想打牌的话找我就好。
t_en: This one's just passing through. {M#Buddy,}{F#Lady,} you've got the wrong person... If you wanna play cards, I'm your guy.

t_ch: 下次牌瘾上来，又或是想来交换卡牌，随时找我。
t_en: Hit me up any time you're in the mood for a game, or you want to trade some cards.

t_ch: 你好啊，{F#小妹妹}{M#小哥}，在「画中世界」各处穿行的时候还习惯吗？
t_en: Hey there, {F#young lady.}{M#buddy!} You getting the hang of traversing the World in Canvas yet?

t_ch: 需要的话可以在我这儿练习一番？
t_en: Need some practice? You can always try your luck with me.

t_ch: 先来点简单的练练手吧。
t_en: Let's start with something easy to warm up.

t_ch: 算了。
t_en: Forget it.

t_ch: 想要练习的话，可以随时来找我。
t_en: If you ever want to practice, come find me anytime.

t_ch: 你在这附近闲逛好一阵了，你是不是想玩这个广场上的游戏呢？
t_en: You've been hanging around here for a while now. Are you interested in playing the games in this Plaza?

t_ch: 我想玩游戏！
t_en: I wanna play a game!

t_ch: 那算你找对尘灵了。环顾四周吧，看看世界游戏大全三合一，你喜欢哪个？
t_en: Well, you came to the right wispae. Look around! We've got a three-in-one world game collection. Which one catches your eye?

t_ch: 「不断向下堕落的尘灵」
t_en: "The Wispae That Constantly Falls"

t_ch: 那就去勇敢堕落吧。
t_en: Then go ahead and fall.

t_ch: 「想飞却飞不动的尘灵」
t_en: "The Wispae That Wants To Fly But Can't Fly"

t_ch: 加油飞，别掉下去了。
t_en: Keep flapping, don't drop outta the sky now!

t_ch: 「等着天上掉钱的尘灵」
t_en: "The Wispae Waiting For Money to Fall From The Sky"

t_ch: 多捡一些，别客气。
t_en: Grab some more, don't hold back.

t_ch: …感觉暂时不想玩呢。
t_en: ...Not really in the mood right now.

t_ch: 下次有空再来。
t_en: Drop by again when you're free.

t_ch: 我问你个事…
t_en: Let me ask you something...

t_ch: 什么事呢？
t_en: What is it?

t_ch: 你们这是什么造型？
t_en: What's with the getup?

t_ch: 我是口。
t_en: I'm Oris.

t_ch: 我们是口口。
t_en: We're Orisoris.

t_ch: 我们仨就是口口口，有品吧？
t_en: The three of us are Orisorisoris. Pretty classy, right?

t_ch: 这里都有些什么游戏呢？
t_en: So what kind of games do they have here?

t_ch: 「不断向下堕落的尘灵」、「想飞却飞不动的尘灵」、「等着天上掉钱的尘灵」——主要是这三款时尚单品。
t_en: "The Wispae That Constantly Falls," "The Wispae That Wants To Fly But Can't Fly," and "The Wispae Waiting For Money to Fall From The Sky" — mainly these three fashionable items.

t_ch: 怎么感觉有点丧丧的？
t_en: Why do I get the feeling things are kinda bleak?

t_ch: …有那种积极的尘灵，肯定也会有这样丧丧的，希望你能喜欢。
t_en: ...Just like there are upbeat wispae, there are bound to be these gloomy ones too. Hope you'll like them.

t_ch: 怎么只有三款游戏呢？
t_en: Wait, there are only three games?

t_ch: …这里只有我们仨了，你看着办吧。
t_en: ...It's just the three of us here. Your call.

t_ch: …感觉暂时不想玩呢。
t_en: ...Not really in the mood right now.

t_ch: 下次有空再来。
t_en: Drop by again when you're free.

t_ch: 抱歉我没空。
t_en: Sorry, I'm busy.

t_ch: 下次有空再来。
t_en: Drop by again when you're free.

t_ch: 喂喂喂？各位粉丝！久等了，你们听得见吗！
t_en: Hello? Hello? All my lovely fans! Sorry to keep you waiting. Can you hear me!?

t_ch: 听得见！火花花！
t_en: We can hear you, Sparxicle!

t_ch: 今天大家有好好工作吗？有好好吃饭吗？
t_en: Has everyone been working hard today? Did everyone eat properly?

t_ch: 肚皮饱饱心情好，看火花花看到老！
t_en: A full belly makes a happy heart. Let's watch Sparxicle till it gets dark!

t_ch: 今天大家…有好好爱我吗？
t_en: Has everyone... been treating me with lots of love today?

t_ch: 一生只爱火花花，变心一定遭雷劈！
t_en: Forever devoted to Lady Sparxie. If ever not, may lightning strike me!

t_ch: 嗯？不对劲呀…今天的观众里，怎么有人身上，沾染了{RUBY_B#花火}旧型号{RUBY_E#}的气息呢？
t_en: Hm? Something's off... Why do I sense my {RUBY_B#Sparkle}old model{RUBY_E#}'s aura on some people in the audience today?

t_ch: 糟了，这不会是说我们吧！
t_en: Oh boy, she must be talking about us!

t_ch: 让我看看，是哪个坏宝宝，去见了不该见的人呢？
t_en: Let's see, which naughty ones went to meet someone they shouldn't have?

t_ch: 呀，被你逃出来了啊，电子囚笼里的小宠物。看来我还是要动用一些「爱的力量」才能把你抓回去。
t_en: Ah, so my little pets managed to escape from their electronic cage. Looks like I'll have to use the "power of love" to catch you and bring you back.

t_ch: 我贴心的小粉丝们，那两个坏家伙要伤害我，拜托大家，保护火花花好吗！
t_en: My dear lovely fans, those two bullies want to hurt me! Please, everyone, protect your beloved Sparxicle, won't you!?

t_ch: 抓住坏东西！抓住坏东西！抓住坏东西！
t_en: Get those baddies! Get those baddies! Get those baddies!

t_ch: 喂喂，我们没有恶意，不能谈谈吗？
t_en: Hey hey, we mean no harm! Can't we just talk this out?

t_ch: 啊！「没有恶意」，「我们谈谈」？这不是公司进入二相乐园接管一切的时候最爱说的话吗？看来你们是一丘之貉呢！
t_en: Ha! "No harm," "talk this out"? Isn't that exactly what the IPC loved to say when they took over Planarcadia? You're all cut from the same cloth!

t_ch: 你们想像公司那样，一手操控乐子神留给这个世界的游戏，对吧？
t_en: You want to control the game that The Laughter left for this world, just like the IPC, don't you?

t_ch: {RUBY_B#阿哈}欢愉之主{RUBY_E#}所留下的仪式，绝不能被你们玷污，变成一个无趣的、可悲的、枯燥的、乏味的、功利的…联谊活动。
t_en: The ceremony left by the {RUBY_B#Aha}Master of Elation{RUBY_E#} must not be defiled by the likes of you, and turned into some boring, pathetic, dull, tedious, profit-driven... social mixer.

t_ch: 你对我们的误会可太大了！
t_en: You've got us all wrong!

t_ch: 恢复「幻月游戏」的乐子——这是假面愚者不可推卸的责任。
t_en: Bringing the fun back to the Phantasmoon Games, that's the Masked Fools' unequivocal duty.

t_ch: 我最最可爱的粉丝们～♥快上吧！
t_en: My dearest, cutest fans~♥ Let's get this party started!

t_ch: 到此为止！所有人！不许乱动！违法幻造种，你被捕了！
t_en: Stand down! Everyone! Don't move a muscle! Imaginae, you're under arrest for breaking the law!

t_ch: 星穹列车的客人，我是「异常防御部」的治安官。别担心，有我在，她没法伤害你们的。
t_en: Passengers of the Astral Express, I'm an officer from the Department of Aberration Defense. Don't worry, she won't be able to harm you as long as I'm here.

t_ch: 碍事的家伙，在「幻月游戏」期间，谒者的所作所为，官方应该无权插手吧？
t_en: You meddlesome fool, officials have no right to interfere with a Supplicant's actions during the Phantasmoon Games, do they?

t_ch: 持有面具的人才算得上谒者，而你，不过是这片土地上，成千上万个自称「想要加入幻月游戏」却借机闹事的暴乱分子之一。
t_en: Only those who possess a mask can be called Supplicants. You're just one of thousands of troublemakers in this land who claim to be "joining the Phantasmoon Games" while actually causing chaos.

t_ch: 二相乐园是法治社会，任何违背法律的行为，就算打着「幻月游戏」的名义行动，「异常防御部」也会严惩不贷。
t_en: Planarcadia is a society governed by law. Any act that violates the law, even if done in the name of the Phantasmoon Games, will be severely punished by the Department of Aberration Defense.

t_ch: 什么严惩不贷？哈哈，不过是一条公司的哈巴狗，居然有这么强的自豪感？真是太好笑了。
t_en: Severely punished? Haha, you're just a lapdog of the IPC, yet you're still so full of pride. That's very funny.

t_ch: 所以我才说嘛，公司治下的「二相乐园」，无聊到爆~连幻月游戏都变成了乖宝宝们才能参加的过家家。
t_en: That's exactly what I'm saying. Planarcadia under the IPC's rule is boring as hell~ Even the Phantasmoon Games have turned into some kiddie play-date for all the goody-two-shoes.

t_ch: 无名客，你们暂时自由了。不过，我会盯着你们的。
t_en: Nameless, you're free to go for now. But I'll be keeping my eyes on you.

t_ch: 下次见面时，我一定要把你们变成我的忠实粉丝，变成…我的东西~♥
t_en: Next time we meet, I'll turn you into devoted fans. I'll make you... mine~♥

t_ch: 哼…逃走了吗？
t_en: Hmph... escaped, huh?

t_ch: 两位，借过一边，我想和你们聊两句。
t_en: Excuse me, I'd like to have a word with you two.

t_ch: 汪，你好！我们正在确保火花的粉丝有序离场，请暂时不要接近广场。
t_en: Woof, hello! We're making sure Sparxie's fans leave in an orderly fashion, so please stay away from the plaza for now.

t_ch: 再次自我介绍，我是朽叶，「异常防御部」的治安官。
t_en: Let me introduce myself again. I'm Kuchiba, an officer from the Department of Aberration Defense.

t_ch: 咱们就不用自我介绍了吧？朽叶小姐应该认识我俩。
t_en: We don't need to introduce ourselves, do we? Miss Kuchiba, you probably know who we are.

t_ch: 当然。报纸也好，电视新闻也罢，一直在报道呢。
t_en: Of course. The newspapers, TV channels... they've all been reporting on you non-stop.

t_ch: 我以为你是警犬驯养员。
t_en: I thought you were a police dog trainer.

t_ch: 警犬？哦，你是说那些「犬灵」吧。人家可是正儿八经的警方执法人员，有些资历比我还深呢。
t_en: Police dog? Oh, you mean those "woofae." They're legitimate law enforcement officers, and some of them have even more experience than I do.

t_ch: 不过，作为「异常防御部」的工作人员，我有一些小小特权可以借调他们为我办事。
t_en: However, as a staff member of the Department of Aberration Defense, I have some special privileges that allow me to request their assistance.

t_ch: 「异常防御部」？
t_en: Department of Aberration Defense?

t_ch: 嗯，如二位所知，二相乐园是个奇妙的世界。被绘师画出的幻造生物，意外获得了生命的物品，画卷深处的异空间，还有我们脚下偶尔颤动的大地……
t_en: Mm-hmm. As you both know, Planarcadia is quite a fascinating world. Creatures made real by artists' brushstrokes, objects that unexpectedly come to life, strange dimensions hidden within paintings, and even the ground beneath our feet that occasionally trembles...

t_ch: 这些都是「异常防御部」存在的意义：从管理超自然异常，到注册幻造种、确保他们的存续。
t_en: This is what the Department of Aberration Defense exists for: everything from managing supernatural anomalies to registering imagenae and ensuring their continued existence.

t_ch: 当然，还有火花刚刚提到的「幻月游戏」。
t_en: And of course, there's the Phantasmoon Games that Sparxie just mentioned.

t_ch: 所以，是谁派你来救我们？
t_en: So, who sent you to rescue us?

t_ch: 我猜的没错的话，应该是斯科特先生请你来的吧？
t_en: If I'm not mistaken, was it Mr. Skott who sent you here?

t_ch: 原来那位盛气凌人的公司专员叫这个名字。这位…斯科特先生觉得对手不是普通的罪犯，是假面愚者，必须重拳出击，所以一个电话拍到了「异常防御部」。
t_en: So that's the name of that high and mighty IPC Specialist. This... Mr. Skott believed he wasn't dealing with ordinary criminals, but with Masked Fools, which required decisive action. So a phone call was immediately made to the Department of Aberration Defense.

t_ch: 倒也不出所料…那接下来我们怎么办？导游跑了，和火花的粉丝打了一架…今天的逛街计划是不是泡汤了？
t_en: Well, it's not surprising... but what do we do now? Our guide ran off, and we got into a fight with Sparxie's fans... I guess our shopping plans for today are down the drain?

t_ch: 咱们是不是该打个电话给姬子姐，跟她通报一下情况？
t_en: Should we give Himeko a call and fill her in on what's going on?

t_ch: 她眼下正在会谈吧？
t_en: Isn't she in a meeting right now?

t_ch: 会打扰她吧？
t_en: Wouldn't that disturb her?

t_ch: 说的是呐。
t_en: I guess you're right.

t_ch: 二位倒也不用着急。对了，我猜你们应该还没尝过这儿的点心吧？
t_en: No need to rush, you two. Oh! I bet you haven't tried the local delicacies yet, have you?

t_ch: 这样吧，我带两位去附近先吃点东西，你们也好慢慢消磨时间，等待你们的朋友。
t_en: How about this? I'll take you both to grab a bite nearby. That way you can kill some time while waiting for your friend.

t_ch: 好耶，我肚子早打雷了！
t_en: Yay! My stomach's been growling like crazy!

t_ch: 哇哦——
t_en: Whoa...

t_ch: 救命，居然挤了那么多人！
t_en: Holy cow, it's packed in here!

t_ch: 这又是什么？
t_en: What do we have here?

t_ch: 别怕，只是些当地的小特产。
t_en: Don't worry, just some local specialties.

t_ch: 浣熊{F#小姐}{M#先生}！我们爱你！
t_en: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} Raccoon! We love you!

t_ch: 三月兔兔，你最可爱~
t_en: March Bunny Bun, you're the cutest~

t_ch: 请、请给我签个名，拜托！
t_en: P—Please, can I get your autograph? Pretty please!

s_en: Fan Who Wants to Shake Hands
t_ch: 请跟我握个手，这只手这辈子就不洗了。
t_en: Please shake my hand! I'm never washing this hand again!

t_ch: 星穹列车就来了两个人？
t_en: Only two people from the Astral Express came?

t_ch: 其他人还没下车吧？
t_en: The others haven't gotten off yet, right?

t_ch: 请保持距离！请冷静！
t_en: Keep your distance! Please stay calm!

t_ch: 你们别拦着我！
t_en: Stop holding me back!

t_ch: 我…怎么变成帕姆了？
t_en: H—How did I turn into Pom-Pom?

t_ch: 仔细一看，和帕姆也不一样啊…
t_en: Wait, on closer inspection, you don't look exactly like Pom-Pom...

t_ch: 也许在这儿的人眼里，「开拓」就长这样？
t_en: Maybe this is what the Trailblaze looks like to the people here?

t_ch: 天呐，我可以跳好高！
t_en: Wow, I can jump so high!

t_ch: 听，音乐变了！
t_en: Listen, the music changed!

t_ch: 哟吼！出发啦！
t_en: Let's go!

t_ch: 那是…杨叔最喜欢的大机器人！
t_en: That's... one of those giant robots Mr. Yang loves!

t_ch: 那照相亭，长得好像我的相机啊。
t_en: That photo booth looks a lot like my camera.

t_ch: 那是「黑猫拍立得」，想去看看嘛？
t_en: It's a Black Cat Instacam. Wanna check it out?

t_ch: 那是…猫猫开的甜品店吗？
t_en: Is that... a dessert shop run by cats?

t_ch: 看，那儿有家漫画店！
t_en: Look, there's a comic book store!

t_ch: 啊，红绿灯上有什么东西…咱们上天桥看看？
t_en: Oh, there's something on the traffic light... Should we check it out from the overpass?

t_ch: 你到底是什么小动物啊？怎么见到管道就钻？
t_en: Are you some kind of critter? Why do you keep diving into every pipe you see?

t_ch: 这边走，咱们可以拐进美食街，那儿可有不少好东西。
t_en: Let's head this way. We can turn into the food street. They've got all sorts of goodies there.

t_ch: 接下来是要杀狸灭口吗？
t_en: So, are we gonna kill the furbo to silence it?

t_ch: 我们才不会做那么暴力的事！
t_en: We would never do something so violent!

t_ch: 狸猫变！
t_en: Turbo furbo transform!

t_ch: 咳咳咳…怎么还有烟雾弹？卑鄙的狸猫！
t_en: ...A smoke bomb? You sneaky furbo!

t_ch: 这家伙会变化成不同的东西，咱们到处找找！
t_en: That little fella can transform into different things. Let's look around!

t_ch: 哇，好多金币！
t_en: Wow, so many gold coins!

t_ch: 只是些无主的愿力碎片，遇到就捡起来吧。
t_en: Just some unclaimed Wishpower fragments. Pick them up when you find them.

t_ch: 这些小尘灵还挺调皮。
t_en: These little wispae are quite mischievous.

t_ch: 和三月宝宝一样活泼。
t_en: As lively as our darling March!

t_ch: 我可乖了好嘛！
t_en: Hey, I'm being super well-behaved here!

t_ch: 你就是花火提到的「敌人」吗？
t_en: Are you the "enemy" that Sparkle mentioned?

t_ch: 你和花火到底是什么关系？
t_en: What exactly is your relationship with Sparkle?

t_ch: 这个没用的{RUBY_B#花火}旧型号{RUBY_E#}，请你们来救她？
t_en: Did that useless {RUBY_B#Sparkle}old model{RUBY_E#} send you to save her?

t_ch: 还是…希望你们加入「幻月游戏」？
t_en: Or... is she hoping that you join the Phantasmoon Games?

t_ch: 嘻嘻，让火花花好好给你打扮一下~♥
t_en: Hehe, let Sparxicle give you a proper makeover! ♥

t_ch: 哎？我的造型变了？
t_en: Huh? My outfit changed?

t_ch: 这是…弓箭？
t_en: Is that... a bow?

t_ch: 不错嘛。
t_en: Not bad.

t_ch: 以火花花之名，在此宣判——你们有罪！
t_en: In the name of Sparxicle, we hereby declare: You are guilty!

t_ch: 立即执行抓捕！抓捕！抓捕！
t_en: Arrest them immediately! Arrest them immediately! Arrest! ARREST!

t_ch: 火花花放心飞！我们把黑粉全打碎！(ﾉ>ω<)ﾉ♡
t_en: Just do your thing, Sparxicle! We'll crush all the haters for you! (ﾉ>ω<)ﾉ♡

t_ch: 可恶，居然煽动粉丝来围攻我们。
t_en: Darn it, she's rallying her fans to attack us.

t_ch: 幸亏及时赶来，不然后果不堪设想。
t_en: Thank goodness we made it in time. Otherwise, things could've turned out pretty badly.

t_ch: 放心吧，我和三月不会轻易受伤的。
t_en: Don't worry, March and I don't get hurt that easily.

t_ch: 不堪设想指的是，你和三月小姐把她的粉丝统统撂倒。
t_en: By saying things could've turned out pretty badly, I meant you and Miss March knocking out all of her fans.

t_ch: 我要立刻开一把「银河战力党」！
t_en: I'm firing up a round of Cosmicon Collective right now!

t_ch: 这以前有售货机吗？
t_en: There wasn't a vending machine here before, was there?

t_ch: 摆放的位置也好可疑…
t_en: And the way it's placed is quite suspicious...

t_ch: 狠狠砸一下看看吧，嘻嘻。
t_en: Give it a good smash and see what happens, hehe.

t_ch: 火花花怎么还没来？
t_en: Where's Sparxicle? She still hasn't shown up yet?

t_ch: 我都等不及看到火花啦！
t_en: I can't wait to see Sparxie!

t_ch: 火花花！火花花！
t_en: Sparxicle! Sparxicle!

t_ch: 要用最饱满的情绪欢呼！
t_en: I'm gonna cheer my heart out!

t_ch: 不久前，二维市某处
t_en: Not long ago, somewhere in Duomension City...

t_ch: 色彩还原：<unbreak>96.2%</unbreak>。笔触还原：<unbreak>93.6%</unbreak>。结论：在物理层面，我的临摹已达到鉴定临界值。
t_en: Color reproduction: <unbreak>96.2%</unbreak>. Brushstroke reproduction: <unbreak>93.6%</unbreak>. Conclusion: On the physical level, my reproduction has reached the appraisal threshold.

t_ch: 这幅赝作，足以被判定为真迹。
t_en: This forgery can now be considered the authentic piece.

t_ch: 可你似乎仍不满意。
t_en: Yet you still seem dissatisfied.

t_ch: 告诉我，你在为什么烦恼？那不到4%的误差，还是数字外的什么？
t_en: Tell me, what troubles you? Is it that less than 4% margin of error? Or something beyond the numbers?

t_ch: 我在处理一项难以量化的属性：艺术性。它是成为这片乐园世界管理者的前提。
t_en: I'm grappling with a quality that defies measurement: artistry. It is the prerequisite for becoming the steward of this arcadia.

t_ch: 可你已经是了。「钻石」会记得，你只用六个月就坐上了这个位置。
t_en: But you already are its steward. "Diamond" will remember that you only took six months to claim that title.

t_ch: 是五个月又十五天。虚名没有意义，在「二相乐园」，政治的影响力有限。
t_en: It was five months and fifteen days. Empty titles mean nothing. In Planarcadia, political influence carries limited weight.

t_ch: 要为这幅画作添笔，理解艺术是必要条件。
t_en: To add a stroke to this artwork, one must first understand art.

t_ch: 我了解你。这是结论，不是原因。
t_en: I know you. This is the conclusion, not the cause.

t_ch: 你面前这幅《覆世沧浪图》，是哈托彼亚这颗星球历史中的文明…古弁才天国画师之祖「绘世」所留的遗作。传言她施展神迹，幻造出了一个完整的位面，将整个世界收入画卷中。
t_en: The piece before you, "Worldbreaker Waves," is a relic from one of the civilizations in Ahatopia's history, the final work left behind by Graphia, the ancestral painter of ancient Benzaitengoku. Legend says she performed a miracle, conjuring an entire plane of existence and sealing the whole world within her scroll.

t_ch: 你想知道，她是如何办到的？
t_en: Do you want to know how she did it?

t_ch: 我不否认。人们称之为「神迹」，代表无人知晓本质——换言之，是一片蓝海。
t_en: I will not deny it. People call her achievements a "miracle," meaning its true nature remains unknown. In other words, it is an unexplored market.

t_ch: 先有理解，再有投资。理所应当。
t_en: Understanding comes first, then investment. That is the natural order.

t_ch: 也许，这就是「钻石」选择你的原因。一名结果和效率至上的智械，被投入一座靠想象运转的国度。
t_en: Perhaps this is why "Diamond" chose you. An Intellitron devoted to results and efficiency, cast into a realm sustained by imagination.

t_ch: 「石心十人」期待一场蜕变。祝你在光怪陆离的海洋里，收获自己的「真珠」。
t_en: The "Ten Stonehearts" await a metamorphosis. May you find your own "Pearl" in this strange and dazzling sea.

t_ch: 谢谢。但我的任务是：把控「幻月游戏」的进程。自我成长不在其列。
t_en: Thank you. But my mission is to oversee the progress of the Phantasmoon Games. Personal growth is not part of the task.

t_ch: 翡翠，容我指出：「石心十人」是十位独立的决策者。你试图将人们捆绑，只会适得其反，致使不必要的折损。
t_en: Jade, allow me to point this out: The Ten Stonehearts are ten independent decision-makers. Your attempts to bind people together will only prove counterproductive and bring needless loss.

t_ch: 一如往常，我遵循最优决策：保持中立。这也是我对龙晶的回答。
t_en: As always, I follow the optimal choice: neutrality. That is also my answer to Obsidian.

t_ch: 滴水不漏的答复。你的理性美总是令人着迷。
t_en: A flawless reply. Your cool logic is always captivating.

t_ch: 真珠大人，那位列车领航员来拜访您了。
t_en: Lady Pearl, that Express Navigator has come to see you.

t_ch: 看来，不会再有奢谈艺术的闲暇了。
t_en: It seems we no longer have the leisure to speak of art.

t_ch: 言尽于此。请告诉「钻石」，我会履行自己的职责：战略投资。
t_en: This is all I have to say. Tell Diamond I will fulfill my duty of strategic investment.

t_ch: 请他们进来。
t_en: Send the guests in.

t_ch: 两位，请进吧。
t_en: Both of you, please, come in.

t_ch: 贸然拜会，感谢接见。
t_en: Forgive the sudden visit, and thank you for receiving us.

t_ch: 并非贸然。在推演中，「列车组上门拜访」是达成有效沟通的优质选项。我很高兴：一切顺利。
t_en: It is not sudden. In my deductions, "a visit from the Express Crew" was an optimal choice for achieving effective communication. I am glad: Everything is proceeding smoothly.

t_ch: 能免去寒暄再好不过。我们的目的，你想必也了然于「芯」了？
t_en: To skip the formalities would be best. I imagine that, at your "core," you're already well aware of our purposes?

t_ch: 我知道，二位是为「反毁灭同盟」而来——
t_en: I know that you have come for the "Anti-Destruction Alliance"...

t_ch: 拒绝的概率是：<unbreak>91.2%</unbreak>。可否告诉我：为什么？
t_en: The probability of refusing the proposal stands at <unbreak>91.2%</unbreak>. Can you tell me: Why?

t_ch: 对抗铁墓一役，列车组见证了众多派系的决心。我们不抵触「同盟」的愿景，但「开拓」必须自立。
t_en: The Express Crew bore witness to the resolve of many factions during the battle of Irontomb. We do not oppose the vision of an "alliance," but the Trailblaze must remain independent.

t_ch: 在我们眼里，公司旗下已有「市场开拓部」。而那些被它纳入贸易版图的世界，最后都成了「存护」的基石。
t_en: From our perspective, the IPC already has the "Marketing Development Department," and every world it drew into the cosmic trade map eventually became a cornerstone for the Preservation.

t_ch: 合理的担忧。我可以提供易被忽视的数据：近两纪，加入泛银河贸易体系的星球共<unbreak>1263</unbreak>颗，其中<unbreak>63%</unbreak>保留了原生文明形态，背后是战略投资部的努力。
t_en: That is a reasonable concern. Allow me to present data that is often overlooked. In the past two Eras, <unbreak>1263</unbreak> planets have joined the Pan-Cosmic Trade System, and <unbreak>63%</unbreak> of them have preserved their native civilizations. This is the result of the Strategic Investment Department's work.

t_ch: 「二相乐园」也是其中之一，「存护」和「欢愉」在这片土地上融洽共存。
t_en: Planarcadia is one such world. On this land, the Preservation and the Elation co-exist in harmony.

t_ch: 这点还有待商榷。
t_en: That remains open to debate.

t_ch: 我理解，在此过程中，每一位参与这场「反毁灭之战」的人都可能陷入犹豫、退缩的情绪。但——
t_en: I recognize that throughout this "war against the Destruction," every participant may experience moments of doubt or retreat. But...

t_ch: 基于演算，我们认为沿着「开拓」的路径，基于「存护」的框架，整合「同谐」的人力、「智识」的算力、「巡猎」的军力——「毁灭」的威胁终将被弭平。
t_en: Based on extrapolations, we believe by following the route of the Trailblaze and building upon the framework of the Preservation, we shall gather the manpower of the Harmony, the computational strength of the Erudition, and the military might of the Hunt... The threat of the Destruction will ultimately be eliminated.

t_ch: 犹豫等于动摇，动摇意味着被动——我们的敌人将会利用这些裂痕逐个击破、摧毁我们。
t_en: Hesitation breeds instability, and instability makes us vulnerable, and our enemies will exploit every crack to break us apart.

t_ch: 你的观点不无道理。但请容我指出一处误差：<unbreak>91.2%</unbreak>，这个数字并不准确。
t_en: Your point is valid, but allow me to note one error. That number, <unbreak>91.2%</unbreak>, is inaccurate.

t_ch: 在你看来，拒绝的概率是<unbreak>100%</unbreak>？
t_en: Then, is the probability of rejection <unbreak>100%</unbreak> in your eyes?

t_ch: 不，是0%。很有趣，「零」或「一」也只在角度差别。
t_en: No, it is zero percent. Interestingly, the difference between "zero" and "one" is also only a matter of perspective.

t_ch: 我们前来，不是为了拒绝。相反，星穹列车想要和你合作。
t_en: We did not come to refuse the notion. On the contrary, the Astral Express seeks to work with you.

t_ch: 这一点…超出我的推演。请问：是情绪变动，令二位改变了想法？
t_en: This outcome... exceeds my extrapolations. Tell me, was it a change in emotion that led you both to shift your decision?

t_ch: 不，是你刚才的观点启发了我。
t_en: No. Actually, your earlier perspective inspired me.

t_ch: 在银河这张牌桌上，公司结交的是以百亿人为计的势力。列车与他们相比，原本不值一提。
t_en: The IPC deals with powers that command billions of lives in this cosmic game of cards. The Express had always been insignificant compared to them.

t_ch: 一直以来，我们只是真诚地开拓、探索，设法帮助那些陷入危机的世界。
t_en: We've simply been earnestly trailblazing and exploring all this time, trying to help worlds in crisis.

t_ch: 而如今，正是这份「真诚」有幸让许多人愿意和列车同行，而无名客的朴素让我们的朋友感到安心，不必担忧自己被吞没。
t_en: Now, it is this "earnestness" that has drawn many to journey with the Express, while the Nameless' simplicity assures our friends that they will not be consumed and lose their sense of self.

t_ch: 没错，要说「开拓」有什么过人之处，只有脚下这条「信任」的轨道。
t_en: Indeed. If the Trailblaze has any outstanding strength, it is the track of "trust" that we walk.

t_ch: 所以，我们才会来找你，真珠小姐。请你放下石心十人的身份，设想这样一种可能——
t_en: That is why we came to you, Miss Pearl. Please set aside your role as one of the Ten Stonehearts and imagine this possibility...

t_ch: 对抗「毁灭」无需同盟，只需同行。
t_en: To fight against the Destruction, there is no need for an alliance. What we need is to stand by each other.

t_ch: 公司未必是列车的盟友，战略投资部也一样——但「你」可以是。
t_en: The IPC may not stand as an ally of the Express, nor might the Strategic Investment Department... But "you" can.

t_ch: 与「同谐」合力，和「智识」一同数算，校准「巡猎」的锋镝，筑起「存护」的坚盾。
t_en: Work with the Harmony, calculate alongside the Erudition, help aim the arrows of the Hunt, and build the steadfast shield of the Preservation.

t_ch: 那么，「开拓」想在其中扮演什么角色？
t_en: Then, what part does the Trailblaze wish to play in all this?

t_ch: 风帆。
t_en: We shall become the sail.

t_ch: 舰船的旗帜？似乎和我先前的提案，并无不同。
t_en: The ship's sail? That sounds no different from my former proposal.

t_ch: 当然有。穿越风暴的帆，不会在意自身的完整，也绝不试图掌控船的走向。
t_en: It is different. A sail that cuts through the storm does not care for its own welfare, nor does it try to command the ship's course.

t_ch: 但它帮助所有有志对抗「毁灭」的人，穿过这场风暴。
t_en: But it will help all who wish to fight against the Destruction to traverse safely through the storm.

t_ch: 有趣。逻辑在提醒我：方才的表述只是文字游戏。但……
t_en: Interesting. Logic reminds me that those words you spoke are little more than rhetoric. However...

t_ch: 我遵循最优决策：保持中立。
t_en: I will follow the optimal decision: neutrality.

t_ch: 你刚才提到，公司从未改变二相乐园，它依然行走在「欢愉」的命途上。
t_en: You mentioned that the IPC has never changed Planarcadia, and it still follows the Path of Elation.

t_ch: 但在我看来，与星穹列车一样，只是因为{RUBY_B#哈托彼亚}「二相乐园」{RUBY_E#}尚有价值，才没有被改变。
t_en: But in my eyes, {RUBY_B#Ahatopia}Planarcadia{RUBY_E#} has not been altered because it still has value, just like the Astral Express.

t_ch: 公司想利用「幻月游戏」，接触并拉拢{RUBY_B#「欢愉」}一位星神{RUBY_E#}——我说的对吗？
t_en: The IPC intends to use the Phantasmoon Games to reach out to {RUBY_B#The Elation}an Aeon{RUBY_E#} and draw THEM in. Am I right?

t_ch: 事关机密，我不便回应。
t_en: That involves classified information. I have no comments.

t_ch: 但，既然姬子女士有意合作，在合理范围内，我可以提供更多信息。
t_en: However, since Miss Himeko is open to cooperation, I can share more within reasonable limits.

t_ch: 两位，这边请。
t_en: This way, guests.
